a L. plantarum WCFS1 deletion mutant measured in the PBMC assay.
b Phase of growth from which L. plantarum cells were harvested (log = exponential phase; stat = stationary phase).
c The value is the average difference in 2Log cytokine amounts induced by wild-type L. plantarum and mutant cells harvested in the same phase of growth (log
or stat). A positive value indicates an increase in IL-10 levels produced by PBMCs in response to mutant L. plantarum compared to the wild-type cells.
Calculations of t-test p-values and adjusted (adj.) p-values are described in the text (Materials and Methods). * (0.01 < p < 0.05); ** (0.002 < p < 0.01); *** (p <
0.002) for the adj. p-values.
